name: Project Lazarus 2
short_description: Deploy, adapt, and upgrade your mech in Project Lazarus 2—the next evolution of survival and rogue-lite action! Battle relentless enemies, unlock powerful upgrades, and forge your own path. Gear up and push your limits as every run brings new strategies and intense challenges.
detailed_description:
Introducing Project Lazarus 2, the next evolution in reverse bullet hell action, blending intense mech survival with rogue-lite elements! Face relentless waves of alien monsters as you master strategic upgrades to push your mech’s arsenal to new heights. Gather powerful items and crystals to enhance and level up, ensuring you maintain overwhelming firepower on the battlefield.

Project Lazarus 2 builds on the foundation of its predecessor, bringing back all legacy content from Project Lazarus while expanding with new mechs, weapons, and challenges. The battlefield is yours to dominate, with a diverse roster of mechs that offer different combat styles. Some feature familiar, precise controls for seamless action, while others introduce bold new ways to maneuver and unleash destruction, giving you the freedom to adapt your playstyle to any threat.

Take command of an even greater selection of war machines, each equipped with specialized passive abilities, customizable weapon loadouts, and combat traits that shape your strategy. Your choice of mech will define your path to victory, delivering a tailored gameplay experience unlike any other. Take charge and forge your destiny in Project Lazarus 2, where every decision can mean the difference between survival and annihilation.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal
*languages with full audio support
